procedure: Cross the fix, turn LEFT to parallel the outbound course (0°) for 1 minute, then turn RIGHT to intercept inbound course 180°.
Fly direct to the fix, turn RIGHT to the outbound heading (0°), complete the pattern.
Cross the fix, fly outbound on a heading of 330° for 1 minute, then turn RIGHT to intercept the inbound course 180°.
Fly direct to the fix, turn RIGHT to the outbound heading (270°), complete the pattern.
